testcase.name: blackButtonFinding

failure.message: Unable to locate element: Black Button For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#no-such-element-exception Build info: version: '4.27.0', revision: 'd6e718d134' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.11' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.firefox.FirefoxDriver Command: [0eafb5f7-e019-4cfa-8f6d-543aafad78c2, findElement {using=link text, value=Black Button}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: true, browserName: firefox, browserVersion: 152.0.2, moz:accessibilityChecks: false, moz:buildID: 20260621191700, moz:geckodriverVersion: 0.37.0, moz:headless: false, moz:platformVersion: 10.0, moz:processID: 14968, moz:profile: C:\Users\NARAYA~1\AppData\L..., moz:shutdownTimeout: 60000, moz:webdriverClick: true, moz:windowless: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, userAgent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10....} Session ID: 0eafb5f7-e019-4cfa-8f6d-543aafad78c2
